title: Looking for Category Manager at Specsmakers

jsonLd.title: Looking for Category Manager at Specsmakers
jsonLd.description:
Join the Specsmakers family as a Category Manager in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Specsmakers:
Specsmakers is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Specsmakers!
